aiTitle: Modernize app pages and consolidate UI/UX

content.text:
Now I have all the information I need. Let me compile the complete analysis.

## STRUCTURED ANALYSIS: EVIDENCE, ASSETS & SETTINGS PAGES

### 1. EVIDENCE PAGES ANALYSIS

#### Repository List (EvidenceRepositoryPage.tsx, 448 lines)

**Layout & UX:**
- Grid card layout: 3 columns at lg breakpoint, responsive down to 1 column on mobile (line 309)
- Each card displays: type badge, title, summary (line-clamp-2 at line 379), owner, date, relationship count
- Dropdown menu per card with: Edit, Open Full Page, Duplicate, Open Link (external), View in Canvas, Delete

**Filtering & Search:**
- Filter Card component (lines 257-305): search input + two Select dropdowns (type, owner)
- Inline search targets: title, summary, owner (line 131)
- Type filtering: maps evidence types to icons and colors (lines 49-63)
- Owner filtering: dynamically extracts unique owners from data (lines 123-125)

**Key Issues & Dated Patterns:**
- Empty state uses icon + text, but could include visual hierarchy improvements (lines 418-434)
- Date formatting: `new Date(evidence.date).toLocaleDateString()` (line 391) — browser-locale dependent, not standardized
- No bulk actions (only per-item dropdown menus)
- Evidence shown from two sources merged: standalone store + edge evidence (lines 85-120) — dual-context handling not clearly documented

**Context Duality (Global vs In-Canvas):**
- File: EvidenceRepositoryPage.tsx is used at both `/evidence` (global) AND `/canvas/:id/evidence` (nested)
- Adapts via `canvas` from useCanvasStore (line 66) — if canvas exists, only relevant evidence shown AND "View in Canvas" option appears (lines 359-366)
- **Issue:** The adaptation is implicit; no clear loading state or messaging when canvas context is missing

---

#### Evidence Detail Page (EvidencePage.tsx, 231 lines)

**Layout & UX:**
- Top bar: back button + title input + type selector + fullscreen toggle + save button (lines 126-180)
- Metadata section: Owner, Date, External Link inputs in 3-column grid (lines 182-220)
- Rich editor: Editor.JS instance in main area (lines 222-227)

**Key Issues:**
- Metadata fields use basic HTML `<input>` elements instead of shadcn components (lines 186-218) — inconsistent with rest of app
- No autosave indicator or unsaved changes warning (lines 48-95 have autosave logic but UI doesn't reflect it)
- Validation missing: title is required (line 175 `disabled={isLoading || !formData.title}`) but no visual feedback when empty
- Form layout feels rigid; could benefit from modern form component library

---

### 2. ASSETS PAGE ANALYSIS

**Critical Finding: 1791 lines due to severe code duplication and inline component bloat**

#### Root Causes:

**1. Duplicate Table Rendering Logic (Lines 1142-1502)**
- Separate `MetricsTable.tsx` and `RelationshipsTable.tsx` components exist but are **NOT USED**
- AssetsPage re-implements entire table inline:
  - Metrics table: lines 1142-1307 (165 lines)
  - Relationships table: lines 1328-1502 (174 lines)
  - Combined with checkbox handling, column rendering, cell logic

**2. Three Inline Modal Dialogs (Lines 1544-1788)**
- **Tag Dialog** (1544-1614): Fixed-position overlay, hard-coded styling
- **Tag Management Dialog** (1618-1713): Fixed-position overlay, tag CRUD, hard-coded styling
- **Add Asset Dialog** (1716-1788): Fixed-position overlay, asset type selector
- All use dated pattern: `fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 flex items-center justify-center z-50`
- Should use shadcn `Dialog` or `Sheet` components (available in codebase via imports at line 18-28)

**3. Complex State Management (134+ state variables/objects)**
- **Visible columns**: lines 150-172 (`visibleColumns` object, two Set instances)
- **Column order**: lines 175-197 (`columnOrder` object, two arrays)
- **Drag-drop state**: lines 137-138
- **Selection state**: lines 144-149 (two Set instances for metrics/relationships)
- **Dialog states**: lines 115-134 (5+ boolean states)
- **Filter states**: lines 77-83
- This is reasonable BUT mixed with inlined rendering logic makes it unreadable

#### Layout & UX Features (Good):

**Positive Patterns:**
- Stats cards at top (lines 698-729): total metrics, relationships with high-confidence count
- Tab UI for switching between metrics/relationships (lines 732-750)
- Search + dynamic filters (lines 753-846): search, category/type/confidence filters, sort dropdown
- Column visibility/reorder: dropdown menu (lines 850-978) with drag-and-drop indicators
- Selection toolbar (lines 982-1082): shows count, clear selection, bulk tag add, bulk delete, more menu
- CSV export (lines 543-620): complete implementation with headers and formatting

**Issues:**
- Selection toolbar uses blue-50/blue-200 colors — not in design tokens, should use semantic color system
- Checkbox styling at line 1117 hardcodes colors: `text-blue-600 focus:ring-blue-500` — should use theme
- Column widths use Tailwind w-* classes (w-1/4, w-1/6) — brittle, not responsive on smaller screens

#### Data & Filtering (Hooks):

**useAssetsData hook** (lines 86-101):
- Loads project data from Supabase
- Manages metric/relationship tags
- Deduplicates tag loading (loadedTagsRef)

**useAssetsFiltering hook** (lines 103-112):
- Filters metrics by search + category
- Filters relationships by search + type + confidence
- Applies sorting

---

### 3. SETTINGS PAGE ANALYSIS

**File: CanvasSettingsPage.tsx, 425 lines**

#### Tab Structure:
1. **General Tab** (GeneralTab component, lines 279-307)
   - Basic info: name, description, tags
   - Collaborators section (lines 292-293 passed props)
   - Duplicate canvas button (lines 294-306)
   - Delete canvas button

2. **Changelog Tab** (ChangelogTab component, lines 312-315)
   - Filtered changelog with search

#### Form Pattern Issues:

**GeneralTab (lines 58-99 from GeneralTab.tsx):**
- Uses raw HTML inputs: `<input className="w-full border rounded px-3 py-2 text-sm">` (lines 70-74)
- Uses raw HTML textarea (lines 80-85)
- No Input component from shadcn (should use from line 8 or import)
- EnhancedTagInput is used (line 89) but form inputs are not
- **Inconsistency:** mixing shadcn components (Button, Card, Badge) with raw HTML form elements

#### Dialog Pattern (Tag Management, Lines 320-422):
- Uses inline modal: `fixed inset-0 bg-black/50` (line 321)
- Should use Dialog/Sheet component
- Same pattern as AssetsPage (dated)

#### Date Issues:
- No date display in settings page analyzed
- Changelog likely has date rendering (not visible in excerpt)

---

### 4. CONSOLIDATION OPPORTUNITIES

#### **A. Extract Inline Dialogs to Components**

Current state: 3 inline dialogs in AssetsPage (1544-1788) + 1 in CanvasSettingsPage (320-422)

**Action Items:**
1. Create `src/features/assets/components/TagDialog.tsx` for bulk tag operations
2. Create `src/features/assets/components/TagManagementDialog.tsx` for CRUD
3. Create `src/features/assets/components/AddAssetDialog.tsx` for new asset selection
4. Create `src/features/canvas/components/settings/TagManagementDialog.tsx` (reuse or shared)
5. Replace all `fixed inset-0 bg-black/50` patterns with `<Dialog>` from `@radix-ui/react-dialog`

**Benefits:** ~240 lines removed from AssetsPage, consistent UI, reusable

---

#### **B. Extract Table Components**

**Current:** MetricsTable.tsx and RelationshipsTable.tsx exist but are unused (lines 1144-1502 reimplemented inline)

**Action:**
1. Import and use `MetricsTable` component instead of inline code
2. Import and use `RelationshipsTable` component instead of inline code
3. Remove inlined table rendering logic
4. Update parent to pass required props

**Impact:** ~350 lines removed from AssetsPage (reduces 1791 → 1440)

---

#### **C. Shared Confirmation Pattern**

**Current Issues:**
- Browser `confirm()` dialogs: lines 185, 273, 283, 382, 402, 1671 across both Evidence and Assets
- Browser `alert()` dialogs: lines 278, 289, 394, 414, 505, 548, 1680, 1776 in AssetsPage

**Action:**
1. Create `useConfirmDialog` hook returning `{ isOpen, onConfirm, onCancel, message, open }`
2. Create `<ConfirmDialog>` component using shadcn Dialog
3. Replace all `confirm()` calls with modal-based confirmation
4. Replace all `alert()` calls with `toast.error()` or `toast.success()`

**Benefits:** Modern UX, consistent messaging, proper async handling

---

#### **D. Shared Empty State Pattern**

**Evidence Repository:** Lines 418-434
**Assets Page:** Uses `AssetsEmptyState` component (line 1317, 1513)

**Issue:** AssetsEmptyState is good but Evidence Repository duplicates the pattern

**Action:**
1. Audit all empty states across three pages
2. Extract common pattern to `<EmptyState icon={} title={} description={} action={} />`
3. Ensure consistent spacing, typography, icon sizing

---

#### **E. Filter Card Pattern (Evidence → Reusable)**

**Evidence Filter Card (lines 257-305):** Well-structured pattern
- Card wrapper
- Search input with icon
- Dynamic Select dropdowns
- Could be extracted as `<FilterCard>` component

**Action:**
1. Extract to `src/shared/components/FilterCard.tsx`
2. Make filter fields configurable via props
3. Use in Assets page alongside existing filtering

---

#### **F. Selection Toolbar Pattern (Assets → Shared)**

**AssetsPage Selection Toolbar (lines 982-1082):** Good pattern but only used here

**Action:**
1. Extract to `src/shared/components/SelectionToolbar.tsx`
2. Make actions (tags, delete, more) configurable
3. Reuse if bulk operations added to Evidence or other pages

---

### 5. DATED UI/UX ISSUES (Prioritized)

#### **Critical (Breaking Modern UX):**

1. **Browser Native Dialogs** (confirm/alert)
   - Files: EvidenceRepositoryPage.tsx (line 185), AssetsPage.tsx (lines 272, 283, etc.)
   - Impact: Non-accessible, not keyboard-navigable, blocks main thread
   - Fix: Replace with modal dialogs + toast notifications

2. **Inline Modal Styling Pattern** (fixed inset-0 bg-black/50)
   - Files: AssetsPage.tsx (lines 1545, 1618, 1717), CanvasSettingsPage.tsx (line 321)
   - Impact: Hard to maintain, not accessible, duplicated code
   - Fix: Use shadcn `Dialog` or `Sheet` components

3. **Raw HTML Form Inputs in GeneralTab**
   - File: GeneralTab.tsx (lines 70-85)
   - Impact: Inconsistent styling, missing accessibility features
   - Fix: Use `<Input>` and `<Textarea>` from shadcn

4. **Hardcoded Color Classes for Checkboxes**
   - File: AssetsPage.tsx (lines 1117, 1159, 1346)
   - Classes: `text-blue-600 focus:ring-blue-500`
   - Impact: Not themeable, inconsistent with design system
   - Fix: Use checkbox component from shadcn or apply theme colors

#### **High (UX Degradation):**

5. **Browser Locale-Dependent Date Formatting**
   - File: EvidenceRepositoryPage.tsx (line 391), AssetsPage.tsx (lines 1220, 1418)
   - Method: `new Date().toLocaleDateString()`
   - Impact: Unpredictable format for international users, no way to enforce consistent format
   - Fix: Use date formatting library (date-fns, day.js) with explicit locale/format

6. **Duplicate Table Rendering Logic**
   - File: AssetsPage.tsx (lines 1142-1502)
   - Impact: ~350 lines of duplicate code, maintenance burden
   - Fix: Use MetricsTable/RelationshipsTable components

7. **Missing Empty State Messaging for Context-Dependent Views**
   - File: EvidenceRepositoryPage.tsx used in two contexts (global + in-canvas)
   - Issue: "No evidence found" doesn't explain why (filtered vs. no data)
   - Fix: Context-aware empty state messages, show active filters

#### **Medium (Technical Debt):**

8. **Evidence Type Constants Duplicated**
   - Files: EvidenceRepositoryPage.tsx (lines 49-63), EvidenceEditor.tsx (lines 44-58)
   - Fix: Extract to `src/features/evidence/constants/evidenceTypes.ts`

9. **Selection State Across Multiple Components**
   - File: AssetsPage.tsx (lines 144-149, 335-376)
   - Issue: Checkboxes + selection logic scattered
   - Fix: Extract to `useTableSelection()` hook

10. **Column Configuration Hardcoded**
    - File: AssetsPage.tsx (lines 295-332)
    - Issue: Column metadata in page component
    - Fix: Extract to `src/features/assets/config/tableColumns.ts`

11. **No Pagination or Virtualization**
    - File: AssetsPage.tsx table rendering (lines 1141-1523)
    - Issue: Could render 100s/1000s of rows with no performance optimization
    - Fix: Add react-table with pagination or virtual scrolling

---

### 6. TOP MODERNIZATION OPPORTUNITIES (Ranked by Impact)

#### **1. Refactor AssetsPage Layout & State (Highest Impact)**

**Problem:** 1791 lines, 134+ state variables, duplicate table code, inline dialogs

**Solution:**
```
- Extract MetricsTable/RelationshipsTable usage
- Extract 3 dialogs to separate components
- Extract filter configuration to config file
- Extract column definitions to config file
- Extract selection logic to useTableSelection hook
- Result: AssetsPage ~600 lines, highly maintainable
```

**Effort:** Medium | **Value:** High (code clarity, maintainability, reusability)

---

#### **2. Implement Modern Confirmation Dialog Pattern**

**Problem:** Browser `confirm()` and `alert()` across pages

**Solution:**
```typescript
// Create useConfirmDialog hook
const { confirmDelete } = useConfirmDialog();

// Replace:
if (confirm('Are you sure?')) deleteItem();

// With:
await confirmDelete({
  title: 'Delete Item?',
  description: 'This cannot be undone.',
  action: 'Delete',
  onConfirm: () => deleteItem(),
});
```

**Effort:** Low | **Value:** High (modern UX, accessibility, consistency)

---

#### **3. Modernize Form Components (GeneralTab)**

**Problem:** Raw HTML inputs in GeneralTab inconsistent with shadcn usage

**Solution:**
```tsx
// Replace:
<input className="w-full border rounded px-3 py-2 text-sm" />

// With:
<Input value={canvasName} onChange={...} placeholder="Canvas name" />
```

**Effort:** Low | **Value:** Medium (consistency, accessibility)

---

#### **4. Implement Consistent Detail Panel Pattern**

**Problem:** Evidence has modal editor, CardSettingsSheet is right-side panel, RelationshipSheet is right-side panel

**Solution:**
- Standardize on **Sheet** (right-side panel) for all detail editing
- Evidence editor should open in fullscreen sheet or modal (user preference)
- Consistent header, footer, action buttons across all panels

**Effort:** Medium | **Value:** Medium (UX consistency, familiar interaction pattern)

---

#### **5. Add Modern Data Table with Pagination/Virtualization**

**Problem:** AssetsPage table could render 1000s of rows, no pagination

**Solution:**
- Integrate `@tanstack/react-table` (React Table v8+)
- Add pagination, column sorting, column visibility (existing), filtering
- Optional: virtual scrolling for large datasets

**Effort:** Medium | **Value:** Medium (scalability, performance)

---

#### **6. Implement Consistent Date Formatting**

**Problem:** Browser locale-dependent dates across pages

**Solution:**
```typescript
// Create utility
export const formatDate = (date: string | Date) =>
  format(new Date(date), 'MMM d, yyyy', { locale: enUS });

// Use everywhere instead of toLocaleDateString()
```

**Effort:** Low | **Value:** Low (consistency, but low user impact)

---

#### **7. Extract Shared Dialog/Confirmation Components**

**Problem:** 4 inline dialogs across pages using same pattern

**Solution:**
```
- TagDialog.tsx (reusable for metrics & relationships)
- ConfirmDialog.tsx (for all deletions)
- AddAssetDialog.tsx (specific to assets)
- All using shadcn Dialog component
```

**Effort:** Medium | **Value:** High (code reuse, maintainability, consistency)

---

#### **8. Add Bulk Action Confirmation**

**Problem:** AssetsPage bulk delete uses `confirm()` (line 382, 402)

**Solution:**
- Add visual confirmation modal showing:
  - Count of items being deleted
  - Quick preview of items
  - Undo functionality (optional)

**Effort:** Low | **Value:** Medium (safety, UX)

---

### 7. SUMMARY TABLE: Cross-Page Patterns & Recommendations

| Pattern | Evidence Repo | Evidence Detail | Assets | Settings | Recommendation |
|---------|---------------|-----------------|--------|----------|-----------------|
| **Inline Modal** | No | Editor modal | 3x (🔴 dated) | 1x (🔴 dated) | Use Dialog/Sheet components |
| **Confirmation** | `confirm()` | No | `confirm()` × 4 | No | Modal dialog + toast |
| **Empty State** | Custom text | N/A | Component (✓) | N/A | Extract reusable component |
| **Table Rendering** | N/A | N/A | Inlined × 2 | N/A | Use existing Table components |
| **Form Inputs** | Uses Input | Uses Input | Uses Input | Raw HTML (🔴) | Standardize to shadcn |
| **Date Format** | `toLocaleDateString()` | N/A | `toLocaleDateString()` | N/A | Use date-fns/dayjs |
| **Filtering** | Filter card (✓) | N/A | Inline | N/A | Extract Filter card component |
| **Selection** | No | No | Checkboxes + toolbar (✓) | No | Extract useTableSelection hook |
| **Bulk Actions** | No | No | Tags + Delete (✓) | No | Create shared pattern |
| **Detail Panel** | Editor modal | Modal (editor) | Sheets | Inline dialog | Standardize on Sheet pattern |

---

### 8. FILE REFERENCES (Absolute Paths)

**Main Pages:**
- `/home/nadeemramli/workspace/github.com/nadeemramli/metric-mapping/src/features/evidence/pages/EvidenceRepositoryPage.tsx` (448 lines)
- `/home/nadeemramli/workspace/github.com/nadeemramli/metric-mapping/src/features/evidence/pages/EvidencePage.tsx` (231 lines)
- `/home/nadeemramli/workspace/github.com/nadeemramli/metric-mapping/src/features/assets/pages/AssetsPage.tsx` (1791 lines)
- `/home/nadeemramli/workspace/github.com/nadeemramli/metric-mapping/src/features/canvas/pages/CanvasSettingsPage.tsx` (425 lines)

**Child Components:**
- `/home/nadeemramli/workspace/github.com/nadeemramli/metric-mapping/src/features/evidence/components/EvidenceEditor.tsx` (initial 100 lines shown)
- `/home/nadeemramli/workspace/github.com/nadeemramli/metric-mapping/src/features/assets/components/emptystate/AssetsEmptyState.tsx`
- `/home/nadeemramli/workspace/github.com/nadeemramli/metric-mapping/src/features/canvas/components/panels/metric-panel/CardSettingsSheet.tsx` (initial 100 lines shown)
- `/home/nadeemramli/workspace/github.com/nadeemramli/metric-mapping/src/features/canvas/components/settings/tabs/GeneralTab.tsx` (initial 100 lines shown)
- `/home/nadeemramli/workspace/github.com/nadeemramli/metric-mapping/src/features/assets/components/MetricsTable.tsx` (unused, exists but not integrated)
- `/home/nadeemramli/workspace/github.com/nadeemramli/metric-mapping/src/features/assets/components/RelationshipsTable.tsx` (unused, exists but not integrated)

**Hooks:**
- `/home/nadeemramli/workspace/github.com/nadeemramli/metric-mapping/src/shared/hooks/useAssetsData.ts`
- `/home/nadeemramli/workspace/github.com/nadeemramli/metric-mapping/src/shared/hooks/useAssetsFiltering.ts`

You are analyzing a React 19 + TypeScript + Tailwind v4 + shadcn/ui app called Metrimap (a visual metric-tree canvas tool) for a UI/UX modernization effort. Your focus: the EVIDENCE, ASSETS, and SETTINGS pages.

Read these files and closely related ones (follow imports):
- src/features/evidence/pages/EvidenceRepositoryPage.tsx (448 lines) — used at both `/evidence` (global) AND `/canvas/:id/evidence`
- src/features/evidence/pages/EvidencePage.tsx (231 lines) — single evidence detail
- src/features/assets/pages/AssetsPage.tsx (1791 lines)
- src/features/canvas/pages/CanvasSettingsPage.tsx (425 lines)
- Their child components, dialogs, tables

Report back a structured markdown analysis:
1. **Evidence pages** — repository list/grid UX, detail page, filters/search, dated issues. Note that the repository renders in two contexts (global vs in-canvas) — how does it adapt? Cite file:line.
2. **Assets page** — what "assets" are, layout, why it's 1791 lines (bloat? many responsibilities?), dated UI issues. Cite file:line.

5. **Top modernization opportunities** — prioritized, concrete (modern data tables, empty states, bulk actions, consistent detail-panel pattern).

Be concrete, cite file:line, bullet points. Analysis only; do NOT edit files.

**GeneralTab (lines 58-99 from GeneralTab.tsx):**
- Uses raw HTML inputs: `<input className="w-full border rounded px-3 py-2 text-sm">` (lines 70-74)
- Uses raw HTML textarea (lines 80-85)
- No Input component from shadcn (should use from line 8 or import)
- EnhancedTagInput is used (line 89) but form inputs are not
- **Inconsistency:** mixing shadcn components (Button, Card, Badge) with raw HTML form elements

#### Dialog Pattern (Tag Management, Lines 320-422):
- Uses inline modal: `fixed inset-0 bg-black/50` (line 321)
- Should use Dialog/Sheet component
- Same pattern as AssetsPage (dated)

#### Date Issues:
- No date display in settings page analyzed
- Changelog likely has date rendering (not visible in excerpt)

---

### 4. CONSOLIDATION OPPORTUNITIES

#### **A. Extract Inline Dialogs to Components**

Current state: 3 inline dialogs in AssetsPage (1544-1788) + 1 in CanvasSettingsPage (320-422)

**Action Items:**
1. Create `src/features/assets/components/TagDialog.tsx` for bulk tag operations
2. Create `src/features/assets/components/TagManagementDialog.tsx` for CRUD
3. Create `src/features/assets/components/AddAssetDialog.tsx` for new asset selection
4. Create `src/features/canvas/components/settings/TagManagementDialog.tsx` (reuse or shared)
5. Replace all `fixed inset-0 bg-black/50` patterns with `<Dialog>` from `@radix-ui/react-dialog`

**Benefits:** ~240 lines removed from AssetsPage, consistent UI, reusable

---

#### **B. Extract Table Components**

**Current:** MetricsTable.tsx and RelationshipsTable.tsx exist but are unused (lines 1144-1502 reimplemented inline)

**Action:**
1. Import and use `MetricsTable` component instead of inline code
2. Import and use `RelationshipsTable` component instead of inline code
3. Remove inlined table rendering logic
4. Update parent to pass required props

**Impact:** ~350 lines removed from AssetsPage (reduces 1791 → 1440)

---

#### **C. Shared Confirmation Pattern**

**Current Issues:**
- Browser `confirm()` dialogs: lines 185, 273, 283, 382, 402, 1671 across both Evidence and Assets
- Browser `alert()` dialogs: lines 278, 289, 394, 414, 505, 548, 1680, 1776 in AssetsPage

**Action:**
1. Create `useConfirmDialog` hook returning `{ isOpen, onConfirm, onCancel, message, open }`
2. Create `<ConfirmDialog>` component using shadcn Dialog
3. Replace all `confirm()` calls with modal-based confirmation
4. Replace all `alert()` calls with `toast.error()` or `toast.success()`

**Benefits:** Modern UX, consistent messaging, proper async handling

---

#### **D. Shared Empty State Pattern**

**Evidence Repository:** Lines 418-434
**Assets Page:** Uses `AssetsEmptyState` component (line 1317, 1513)

**Issue:** AssetsEmptyState is good but Evidence Repository duplicates the pattern

**Action:**
1. Audit all empty states across three pages
2. Extract common pattern to `<EmptyState icon={} title={} description={} action={} />`
3. Ensure consistent spacing, typography, icon sizing

---

#### **E. Filter Card Pattern (Evidence → Reusable)**

**Evidence Filter Card (lines 257-305):** Well-structured pattern
- Card wrapper
- Search input with icon
- Dynamic Select dropdowns
- Could be extracted as `<FilterCard>` component

**Action:**
1. Extract to `src/shared/components/FilterCard.tsx`
2. Make filter fields configurable via props
3. Use in Assets page alongside existing filtering

---

#### **F. Selection Toolbar Pattern (Assets → Shared)**

**AssetsPage Selection Toolbar (lines 982-1082):** Good pattern but only used here

**Action:**
1. Extract to `src/shared/components/SelectionToolbar.tsx`
2. Make actions (tags, delete, more) configurable
3. Reuse if bulk operations added to Evidence or other pages

---

### 5. DATED UI/UX ISSUES (Prioritized)

#### **Critical (Breaking Modern UX):**

1. **Browser Native Dialogs** (confirm/alert)
   - Files: EvidenceRepositoryPage.tsx (line 185), AssetsPage.tsx (lines 272, 283, etc.)
   - Impact: Non-accessible, not keyboard-navigable, blocks main thread
   - Fix: Replace with modal dialogs + toast notifications

2. **Inline Modal Styling Pattern** (fixed inset-0 bg-black/50)
   - Files: AssetsPage.tsx (lines 1545, 1618, 1717), CanvasSettingsPage.tsx (line 321)
   - Impact: Hard to maintain, not accessible, duplicated code
   - Fix: Use shadcn `Dialog` or `Sheet` components

3. **Raw HTML Form Inputs in GeneralTab**
   - File: GeneralTab.tsx (lines 70-85)
   - Impact: Inconsistent styling, missing accessibility features
   - Fix: Use `<Input>` and `<Textarea>` from shadcn

4. **Hardcoded Color Classes for Checkboxes**
   - File: AssetsPage.tsx (lines 1117, 1159, 1346)
   - Classes: `text-blue-600 focus:ring-blue-500`
   - Impact: Not themeable, inconsistent with design system
   - Fix: Use checkbox component from shadcn or apply theme colors

#### **High (UX Degradation):**

5. **Browser Locale-Dependent Date Formatting**
   - File: EvidenceRepositoryPage.tsx (line 391), AssetsPage.tsx (lines 1220, 1418)
   - Method: `new Date().toLocaleDateString()`
   - Impact: Unpredictable format for international users, no way to enforce consistent format
   - Fix: Use date formatting library (date-fns, day.js) with explicit locale/format

6. **Duplicate Table Rendering Logic**
   - File: AssetsPage.tsx (lines 1142-1502)
   - Impact: ~350 lines of duplicate code, maintenance burden
   - Fix: Use MetricsTable/RelationshipsTable components

7. **Missing Empty State Messaging for Context-Dependent Views**
   - File: EvidenceRepositoryPage.tsx used in two contexts (global + in-canvas)
   - Issue: "No evidence found" doesn't explain why (filtered vs. no data)
   - Fix: Context-aware empty state messages, show active filters

#### **Medium (Technical Debt):**

8. **Evidence Type Constants Duplicated**
   - Files: EvidenceRepositoryPage.tsx (lines 49-63), EvidenceEditor.tsx (lines 44-58)
   - Fix: Extract to `src/features/evidence/constants/evidenceTypes.ts`

9. **Selection State Across Multiple Components**
   - File: AssetsPage.tsx (lines 144-149, 335-376)
   - Issue: Checkboxes + selection logic scattered
   - Fix: Extract to `useTableSelection()` hook

10. **Column Configuration Hardcoded**
    - File: AssetsPage.tsx (lines 295-332)
    - Issue: Column metadata in page component
    - Fix: Extract to `src/features/assets/config/tableColumns.ts`

11. **No Pagination or Virtualization**
    - File: AssetsPage.tsx table rendering (lines 1141-1523)
    - Issue: Could render 100s/1000s of rows with no performance optimization
    - Fix: Add react-table with pagination or virtual scrolling

---

### 6. TOP MODERNIZATION OPPORTUNITIES (Ranked by Impact)

#### **1. Refactor AssetsPage Layout & State (Highest Impact)**

**Problem:** 1791 lines, 134+ state variables, duplicate table code, inline dialogs

**Solution:**
```
- Extract MetricsTable/RelationshipsTable usage
- Extract 3 dialogs to separate components
- Extract filter configuration to config file
- Extract column definitions to config file
- Extract selection logic to useTableSelection hook
- Result: AssetsPage ~600 lines, highly maintainable
```

**Effort:** Medium | **Value:** High (code clarity, maintainability, reusability)

---

#### **2. Implement Modern Confirmation Dialog Pattern**

**Problem:** Browser `confirm()` and `alert()` across pages

**Solution:**
```typescript
// Create useConfirmDialog hook
const { confirmDelete } = useConfirmDialog();

// Replace:
if (confirm('Are you sure?')) deleteItem();

// With:
await confirmDelete({
  title: 'Delete Item?',
  description: 'This cannot be undone.',
  action: 'Delete',
  onConfirm: () => deleteItem(),
});
```

**Effort:** Low | **Value:** High (modern UX, accessibility, consistency)

---

#### **3. Modernize Form Components (GeneralTab)**

**Problem:** Raw HTML inputs in GeneralTab inconsistent with shadcn usage

**Solution:**
```tsx
// Replace:
<input className="w-full border rounded px-3 py-2 text-sm" />

// With:
<Input value={canvasName} onChange={...} placeholder="Canvas name" />
```

**Effort:** Low | **Value:** Medium (consistency, accessibility)

---

#### **4. Implement Consistent Detail Panel Pattern**

**Problem:** Evidence has modal editor, CardSettingsSheet is right-side panel, RelationshipSheet is right-side panel

**Solution:**
- Standardize on **Sheet** (right-side panel) for all detail editing
- Evidence editor should open in fullscreen sheet or modal (user preference)
- Consistent header, footer, action buttons across all panels

**Effort:** Medium | **Value:** Medium (UX consistency, familiar interaction pattern)

---

#### **5. Add Modern Data Table with Pagination/Virtualization**

**Problem:** AssetsPage table could render 1000s of rows, no pagination

**Solution:**
- Integrate `@tanstack/react-table` (React Table v8+)
- Add pagination, column sorting, column visibility (existing), filtering
- Optional: virtual scrolling for large datasets

**Effort:** Medium | **Value:** Medium (scalability, performance)

---

#### **6. Implement Consistent Date Formatting**

**Problem:** Browser locale-dependent dates across pages

**Solution:**
```typescript
// Create utility
export const formatDate = (date: string | Date) =>
  format(new Date(date), 'MMM d, yyyy', { locale: enUS });

// Use everywhere instead of toLocaleDateString()
```

**Effort:** Low | **Value:** Low (consistency, but low user impact)

---

#### **7. Extract Shared Dialog/Confirmation Components**

**Problem:** 4 inline dialogs across pages using same pattern

**Solution:**
```
- TagDialog.tsx (reusable for metrics & relationships)
- ConfirmDialog.tsx (for all deletions)
- AddAssetDialog.tsx (specific to assets)
- All using shadcn Dialog component
```

**Effort:** Medium | **Value:** High (code reuse, maintainability, consistency)

---

#### **8. Add Bulk Action Confirmation**

**Problem:** AssetsPage bulk delete uses `confirm()` (line 382, 402)

**Solution:**
- Add visual confirmation modal showing:
  - Count of items being deleted
  - Quick preview of items
  - Undo functionality (optional)

**Effort:** Low | **Value:** Medium (safety, UX)

---

### 7. SUMMARY TABLE: Cross-Page Patterns & Recommendations

| Pattern | Evidence Repo | Evidence Detail | Assets | Settings | Recommendation |
|---------|---------------|-----------------|--------|----------|-----------------|
| **Inline Modal** | No | Editor modal | 3x (🔴 dated) | 1x (🔴 dated) | Use Dialog/Sheet components |
| **Confirmation** | `confirm()` | No | `confirm()` × 4 | No | Modal dialog + toast |
| **Empty State** | Custom text | N/A | Component (✓) | N/A | Extract reusable component |
| **Table Rendering** | N/A | N/A | Inlined × 2 | N/A | Use existing Table components |
| **Form Inputs** | Uses Input | Uses Input | Uses Input | Raw HTML (🔴) | Standardize to shadcn |
| **Date Format** | `toLocaleDateString()` | N/A | `toLocaleDateString()` | N/A | Use date-fns/dayjs |
| **Filtering** | Filter card (✓) | N/A | Inline | N/A | Extract Filter card component |
| **Selection** | No | No | Checkboxes + toolbar (✓) | No | Extract useTableSelection hook |
| **Bulk Actions** | No | No | Tags + Delete (✓) | No | Create shared pattern |
| **Detail Panel** | Editor modal | Modal (editor) | Sheets | Inline dialog | Standardize on Sheet pattern |

---

### 8. FILE REFERENCES (Absolute Paths)

**Main Pages:**
- `/home/nadeemramli/workspace/github.com/nadeemramli/metric-mapping/src/features/evidence/pages/EvidenceRepositoryPage.tsx` (448 lines)

aiTitle: Modernize app pages and consolidate UI/UX

content.text:
Based on my analysis of the codebase, here is a comprehensive structured report for the Metrimap UI/UX modernization effort:

---

## 1. DASHBOARD PAGE ANALYSIS

**File:** `/home/nadeemramli/workspace/github.com/nadeemramli/metric-mapping/src/features/dashboard/pages/DashboardPage.tsx` (679 lines)

**What it shows:**
- **Header** (lines 168–233): Title, optional dashboard selector dropdown (for groups/subflows), time range selector (7d/30d/90d/1y), Refresh & Export buttons
- **Empty State** (lines 235–262): When no groups exist, displays helpful messaging directing users to create groups on canvas
- **Tabs** (lines 264–669): Overview, Metrics, Insights, Health
  
  - **Overview Tab** (lines 273–414):
    - 4 stat cards (Total Metrics, Relationships, Health Score, Last Updated) with icons
    - Recent Insights card with inline list (icon + title + severity badge + tags + action button)
    - Hardcoded mock insights with types (opportunity/warning/info)
  
  - **Metrics Tab** (lines 418–502):
    - Category filter dropdown
    - "Add to Dashboard" button
    - KPI card grid (3-column: `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3`)
    - Each card shows: title, category badge, value, % change with trend icon, target, simple bar chart trend (colored bars, not Recharts)
  
  - **Insights Tab** (lines 505–582):
    - AI-Powered Insights heading with description
    - Repeated insights as nested cards with larger icons
    - "View Details" and "Take Action" buttons
  
  - **Health Tab** (lines 585–668):
    - System Health card with 3 basic progress bars (Data Quality, Relationship Integrity, Update Frequency) using inline `<div>` widths
    - Recent Activity card with timeline-style list (icon + text + timestamp)

**Chart/Widget Patterns:**
- Uses `Card`, `CardHeader`, `CardTitle`, `CardDescription`, `CardContent` from shadcn/ui
- Simple bar charts rendered with inline `<div>` elements (lines 485–496) styled with opacity and height percentages, NOT Recharts
- Badge variants (secondary, destructive, outline) for status indicators
- Lucide icons for visual hierarchy

**Layout:**
- Responsive grid system: `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4` (stats), `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3` (KPIs)
- Vertical spacing with `space-y-6`, `space-y-4`, `space-y-3`
- Flex layouts for headers and inline controls

**Dated UI Issues:**
- **No real charts:** KPI trends use colored `<div>` bars instead of Recharts/Recharts components (line 490–496)
- **Hardcoded mock data:** `generateMockMetrics()` (lines 53–99) is a fallback; real insights depend on `calculateDashboardInsights()` which currently returns empty array (line 147: `TODO: Add AI insights generation`)
- **Static insights:** Insights section has no filtering, searching, or expanded detail view
- **No skeleton loading:** No loading state when switching dashboards or time ranges
- **Basic progress bars:** Health tab uses inline `<div>` widths instead of a progress component (lines 600–622)
- **Limited interactivity:** Insight cards have an "Eye" button that doesn't navigate or expand
- **No pagination:** All metrics shown at once (potentially unbounded)

**Customizability:**
- Dashboard selector for group-based views (lines 183–210)
- Time range selector (lines 213–223)
- Category filter in Metrics tab (lines 421–436)
- Tab switching for different views

---

## 2. SOURCE PAGE ANALYSIS

**File:** `/home/nadeemramli/workspace/github.com/nadeemramli/metric-mapping/src/features/sources/pages/SourcePage.tsx` (1071 lines)

**What it shows:**
- **Header** (lines 301–328): "Data Governance" title, "Sync All", "Export Report", and context-aware "Add [Source/API/Policy]" button
- **Overview Stats** (lines 330–403): 4 cards (Active Sources, Data Quality %, API Health, Compliance %)
- **Tabs** (lines 407–969): Data Sources, Governance, API Health, Monitoring

  - **Data Sources Tab** (lines 470–639):
    - Search input + Status filter dropdown + System filter dropdown (computed from unique systems, line 264–276)
    - Empty state with icon and CTA button
    - HTML table (7 columns): Data Source (with icon, name, description, tags), System (badge + event code), Status (icon + badge), Quality (colored %), Records Today, Last Sync (timestamp), Actions (dropdown menu)
    - Row hover state with `hover:bg-muted/25`
    - Dropdown menu per row: View Details, Edit Source, Sync Now, Delete
  
  - **Governance Tab** (lines 643–727):
    - Empty state with icon
    - Grid of policy cards (3-column: `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3`)
    - Each card shows: name, status badge, type subtitle, coverage progress bar, owner + next review (small icons), compliance badges
  
  - **API Health Tab** (lines 731–872):
    - Empty state
    - HTML table (7 columns): API Connection (with icon), Status (icon + badge), Response Time (ms), Uptime (%), Requests Today, Error Rate (colored), Actions (dropdown)
  
  - **Monitoring Tab** (lines 876–968):
    - Two-column grid (`grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2`)
    - **Data Pipeline Health** card: List of live sources with green dot + name + records count
    - **Alerts & Issues** card: List of non-connected APIs with yellow warning styling or success message

**Data Management:**
- Uses `useSourcesStore()` hook with full CRUD methods: `createDataSource`, `updateDataSource`, `deleteDataSource`, etc.
- Dialog system with mode states (create/edit/view): 
  - `DataSourceDialog` (56 lines) – **STUB:** only displays `metricName`, no form fields
  - `ApiConnectionDialog` (55 lines) – **STUB:** only displays `name`, no form fields
  - `GovernancePolicyDialog` (56 lines) – **STUB:** minimal
  - `ExportDialog` (37 lines) – **STUB:** hardcoded format selection
  - `MonitoringSettingsDialog` (41 lines) – **STUB:** minimal
- Handlers: `handleDelete()` (lines 154–181), `handleExport()`, `handleRefresh()`, with confirmation dialogs

**Table Patterns:**
- Raw HTML tables with `thead`, `tbody`, `<th>`, `<td>` (not TanStack Table or shadcn/ui table component)
- Header styling: `bg-muted/50`, `text-xs`, `uppercase tracking-wider`
- Status icons via helper functions (lines 231–255): `getStatusIcon()`, `getApiStatusIcon()`, `getDataQualityColor()`
- Inline badges for statuses and categories
- Icon + code snippet for event names (line 552–554)

**Dated UI Issues:**
- **Empty dialog stubs:** All CRUD dialogs are minimal placeholders with no form controls, validation, or field binding (compare to SourceConfigSheet which is comprehensive)
- **Raw HTML tables:** No use of shadcn/ui table or TanStack React Table (modern pattern); CSS Grid-based layouts used elsewhere but not here
- **Mixed styles:** Some views use cards (Governance), others use tables (Data Sources, API Health); inconsistent interaction patterns
- **No pagination/virtualization:** Tables could have unbounded rows
- **No inline editing:** Actions require dropdown > modal dialog flow
- **Search/filter scattered:** Each tab reimplements search/filter UI independently; `useSourceFiltering` hook exists but filtering logic is duplicated
- **Basic status indicators:** Simple colored icons/badges; no sparklines or trend visualizations
- **No multi-select actions:** Bulk operations not supported
- **Hard to distinguish:** Columns in tables not sticky; no resizable columns
- **Empty states generic:** Same icon for all empty tabs (Database, Shield, Link icons) but messaging is tab-specific
- **No data loading states:** No skeleton loaders while fetching sources

---

## 3. CONSOLIDATION OPPORTUNITIES

**Overlap between Dashboard & Source pages:**

1. **Redundant stat cards:**
   - Dashboard shows: Total Metrics, Relationships, Health Score, Last Updated
   - Source page shows: Active Sources, Data Quality %, API Health, Compliance %
   - Both pages calculate overlapping metrics independently; no shared stat component

2. **Scattered data-source UX:**
   - **Canvas (source-node):** SourceConfigSheet.tsx (438 lines) provides full data configuration (warehouse, file, manual, generate) with preview & run/save flow
   - **Sources page:** Minimal dialogs (56–37 lines each) for managing the same entities
   - **Data contract split:** `sourceBinding.ts` defines `MetricValue` and `deriveSeries()` in canvas utils; Sources page doesn't surface series preview or validation
   - No bidirectional sync between canvas source nodes and Source page data sources

3. **Dashboard generator vs. Source page tabs:**
   - Dashboard uses `generateDashboardsFromGroups()` which filters canvas nodes by group membership
   - Source page independently fetches/manages data sources, governance, APIs via Zustand store
   - No connection: a metric card's data source isn't linked to a "Data Source" record in Source page

4. **Multiple ways to define metrics:**
   - **Canvas:** Metric nodes with inline data (manual rows, generated series, file, warehouse)
   - **Sources page:** DataSource records (metricName, sourceSystem, eventName, status, etc.)
   - **Unclear mapping:** Are Sources page records meant to be "connectors" to external systems that feed canvas metrics? Currently no clear schema.

**Inefficiencies:**

- Redundant filtering/search logic (dashboard category filter vs. source system/status filters)
- Two separate stat card designs (dashboard uses 4-column grid, source uses same but computes different metrics)
- Dialog CRUD patterns not reused across features (Source page dialogs are stubs; canvas uses different patterns)

---

## 4. TOP MODERNIZATION OPPORTUNITIES (Prioritized)

### **High Priority — Core UX Gaps**

#### 1. **Complete Source Page Dialog System** ⭐ (Concrete, High Impact)
- **Issue:** All 5 CRUD dialogs (DataSourceDialog, ApiConnectionDialog, GovernancePolicyDialog, ExportDialog, MonitoringSettingsDialog) are 37–56 line stubs with no form controls
- **Opportunity:** Build full forms with:
  - Field binding (React Hook Form or Zod-based forms)
  - Validation (zod schemas exist in `source.ts`)
  - Rich inputs (selects, checkboxes, multi-select for tags/compliance)
  - Async handlers (create, update, delete with feedback)
  - Error handling and success toasts
- **File:** `/home/nadeemramli/workspace/github.com/nadeemramli/metric-mapping/src/features/sources/components/dialogs/`
- **Estimate:** 3–4 days (one day per dialog type, reuse form patterns)

#### 2. **Replace HTML Tables with Modern Data Table** ⭐ (Concrete, High Impact)
- **Issue:** Source page Data Sources (lines 491–637) and API Health (lines 749–871) tabs use raw HTML tables; no sorting, resizing, or column hiding
- **Opportunity:** 
  - Implement TanStack React Table v8 (already in package.json) for:
    - Column management (hide/show)
    - Sorting (multi-column)
    - Row selection + bulk actions
    - Pagination/virtualization for large datasets
    - Resizable columns
  - Or use shadcn/ui's table component with enhanced features
  - Reuse for both tabs (DRY principle)
- **Files:** 
  - `/home/nadeemramli/workspace/github.com/nadeemramli/metric-mapping/src/features/sources/pages/SourcePage.tsx` (lines 491–637, 749–871)
- **Estimate:** 2–3 days

#### 3. **Replace DIV-based Trends with Real Charts** ⭐ (Concrete, High Impact)
- **Issue:** Dashboard KPI cards (lines 485–496) render trends as colored `<div>` bars; no actual chart library
- **Opportunity:**
  - Add sparkline charts (Recharts mini line/bar) for each KPI showing trend over selected time period
  - Use Recharts' `ResponsiveContainer` + `LineChart` with `XAxis`, `YAxis`, `Tooltip`
  - Example: 6-point trend for "Last 7 days" as a small inline chart
- **File:** `/home/nadeemramli/workspace/github.com/nadeemramli/metric-mapping/src/features/dashboard/pages/DashboardPage.tsx` (lines 485–496)
- **Estimate:** 1–2 days

#### 4. **Implement Unified Filter/Search Component** 🔧 (Code Quality)
- **Issue:** Dashboard category filter (lines 421–436) and Source page status/system filters (lines 432–464) are independent; `useSourceFiltering` hook (referenced line 134) suggests intended shared pattern
- **Opportunity:**
  - Create reusable `DataTableFilters` component accepting filter config (e.g., `{ statusField, systemField, searchField }`)
  - Consolidate filter state into Zustand or Context
  - Apply to Source page tabs + Dashboard metrics section
- **Estimate:** 1–2 days

### **Medium Priority — Visual Consistency & Modern Patterns**

#### 5. **Modernize Card Grid System with Configurable Widgets** 🎨 (Architecture)
- **Issue:** 
  - Dashboard stats use `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4` (hardcoded)
  - Source page governance uses `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3`
  - No way to customize widget layout per user
- **Opportunity:**
  - Create `<DashboardWidget>` and `<DataGridCard>` components with consistent styling (border, shadow, padding)
  - Support 2/3/4-column layouts via props
  - Add "customize dashboard" panel to save preferred layout
- **Files:** `/src/shared/components/dashboard/` (new feature)
- **Estimate:** 2–3 days

#### 6. **Add Loading States & Skeleton Loaders** ⚡ (UX Polish)
- **Issue:** No visual feedback when switching dashboards, loading data sources, or awaiting API responses
- **Opportunity:**
  - Add skeleton screens for stats cards, tables, KPI grids
  - Use `react-loading-skeleton` or shadcn/ui skeleton component
  - Show "Syncing..." state during `handleRefresh()`
- **Files:** Dashboard, Source, and dialog components
- **Estimate:** 1–2 days

#### 7. **Centralize Status/Health Color & Icon Logic** 🎯 (Code Quality)
- **Issue:** Status icon helper functions (lines 231–255 in SourcePage) are duplicated; `getStatusIcon()`, `getApiStatusIcon()`, `getDataQualityColor()` have overlapping logic
- **Opportunity:**
  - Create `/src/shared/utils/statusHelpers.ts` with unified color/icon schemes
  - Define enum-based status mappings (e.g., `StatusColors.Live = { bg: 'bg-green-100', text: 'text-green-600', icon: CheckCircle }`)
  - Apply across Dashboard, Source, and Canvas components
- **Estimate:** 0.5 day

### **Medium-Low Priority — Data & Architecture**

#### 8. **Link Canvas Metrics to Source Page Data Sources** 🔗 (Feature Integration)
- **Issue:** A metric card's data (defined via SourceConfigSheet) is not surfaced in Source page; "data sources" in Source page seem disconnected from canvas
- **Opportunity:**

toolUseResult.prompt:
You are analyzing a React 19 + TypeScript + Tailwind v4 + shadcn/ui + Recharts app called Metrimap (a visual metric-tree canvas tool) for a UI/UX modernization effort. Your focus: the DASHBOARD page and the SOURCE (data sources) page — both are sub-pages inside a canvas (routes `/canvas/:id/dashboard` and `/canvas/:id/source`).

Read these files and closely related ones (follow imports):
- src/features/dashboard/pages/DashboardPage.tsx (679 lines)
- src/features/sources/pages/SourcePage.tsx (1071 lines)
- Their child components (charts, cards, source connection UI, dialogs)
- Note: there's recent in-progress data-source work — files like src/features/canvas/components/nodes/source-node/source-config-sheet.tsx, src/features/canvas/utils/sourceBinding.ts. Glance at how sources are surfaced.

Report back a structured markdown analysis:
1. **Dashboard page** — what it shows, chart/widget patterns, layout, dated UI issues. Is it customizable? Cite file:line.
2. **Source page** — what it shows, how data sources are managed, dated UI issues. Cite file:line.
3. **Consolidation opportunities** — overlap between dashboard/source/canvas data tabs, scattered data-source UX, redundant info.
4. **Top modernization opportunities** — prioritized, concrete (e.g. grid widget system, empty states, modern data-table, filter/search patterns).

Be concrete, cite file:line, bullet points. Analysis only; do NOT edit files.

content.text:
Based on my analysis of the codebase, here is a comprehensive structured report for the Metrimap UI/UX modernization effort:

---

## 1. DASHBOARD PAGE ANALYSIS

**File:** `/home/nadeemramli/workspace/github.com/nadeemramli/metric-mapping/src/features/dashboard/pages/DashboardPage.tsx` (679 lines)

**What it shows:**
- **Header** (lines 168–233): Title, optional dashboard selector dropdown (for groups/subflows), time range selector (7d/30d/90d/1y), Refresh & Export buttons
- **Empty State** (lines 235–262): When no groups exist, displays helpful messaging directing users to create groups on canvas
- **Tabs** (lines 264–669): Overview, Metrics, Insights, Health
  
  - **Overview Tab** (lines 273–414):
    - 4 stat cards (Total Metrics, Relationships, Health Score, Last Updated) with icons
    - Recent Insights card with inline list (icon + title + severity badge + tags + action button)
    - Hardcoded mock insights with types (opportunity/warning/info)
  
  - **Metrics Tab** (lines 418–502):
    - Category filter dropdown
    - "Add to Dashboard" button
    - KPI card grid (3-column: `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3`)
    - Each card shows: title, category badge, value, % change with trend icon, target, simple bar chart trend (colored bars, not Recharts)
  
  - **Insights Tab** (lines 505–582):
    - AI-Powered Insights heading with description
    - Repeated insights as nested cards with larger icons
    - "View Details" and "Take Action" buttons
  
  - **Health Tab** (lines 585–668):
    - System Health card with 3 basic progress bars (Data Quality, Relationship Integrity, Update Frequency) using inline `<div>` widths
    - Recent Activity card with timeline-style list (icon + text + timestamp)

**Chart/Widget Patterns:**
- Uses `Card`, `CardHeader`, `CardTitle`, `CardDescription`, `CardContent` from shadcn/ui
- Simple bar charts rendered with inline `<div>` elements (lines 485–496) styled with opacity and height percentages, NOT Recharts
- Badge variants (secondary, destructive, outline) for status indicators
- Lucide icons for visual hierarchy

**Layout:**
- Responsive grid system: `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4` (stats), `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3` (KPIs)
- Vertical spacing with `space-y-6`, `space-y-4`, `space-y-3`
- Flex layouts for headers and inline controls

**Dated UI Issues:**
- **No real charts:** KPI trends use colored `<div>` bars instead of Recharts/Recharts components (line 490–496)
- **Hardcoded mock data:** `generateMockMetrics()` (lines 53–99) is a fallback; real insights depend on `calculateDashboardInsights()` which currently returns empty array (line 147: `TODO: Add AI insights generation`)
- **Static insights:** Insights section has no filtering, searching, or expanded detail view
- **No skeleton loading:** No loading state when switching dashboards or time ranges
- **Basic progress bars:** Health tab uses inline `<div>` widths instead of a progress component (lines 600–622)
- **Limited interactivity:** Insight cards have an "Eye" button that doesn't navigate or expand
- **No pagination:** All metrics shown at once (potentially unbounded)

**Customizability:**
- Dashboard selector for group-based views (lines 183–210)
- Time range selector (lines 213–223)
- Category filter in Metrics tab (lines 421–436)
- Tab switching for different views

---

## 2. SOURCE PAGE ANALYSIS

**File:** `/home/nadeemramli/workspace/github.com/nadeemramli/metric-mapping/src/features/sources/pages/SourcePage.tsx` (1071 lines)

**What it shows:**
- **Header** (lines 301–328): "Data Governance" title, "Sync All", "Export Report", and context-aware "Add [Source/API/Policy]" button
- **Overview Stats** (lines 330–403): 4 cards (Active Sources, Data Quality %, API Health, Compliance %)
- **Tabs** (lines 407–969): Data Sources, Governance, API Health, Monitoring

  - **Data Sources Tab** (lines 470–639):
    - Search input + Status filter dropdown + System filter dropdown (computed from unique systems, line 264–276)
    - Empty state with icon and CTA button
    - HTML table (7 columns): Data Source (with icon, name, description, tags), System (badge + event code), Status (icon + badge), Quality (colored %), Records Today, Last Sync (timestamp), Actions (dropdown menu)
    - Row hover state with `hover:bg-muted/25`
    - Dropdown menu per row: View Details, Edit Source, Sync Now, Delete
  
  - **Governance Tab** (lines 643–727):
    - Empty state with icon
    - Grid of policy cards (3-column: `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3`)
    - Each card shows: name, status badge, type subtitle, coverage progress bar, owner + next review (small icons), compliance badges
  
  - **API Health Tab** (lines 731–872):
    - Empty state
    - HTML table (7 columns): API Connection (with icon), Status (icon + badge), Response Time (ms), Uptime (%), Requests Today, Error Rate (colored), Actions (dropdown)
  
  - **Monitoring Tab** (lines 876–968):
    - Two-column grid (`grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2`)
    - **Data Pipeline Health** card: List of live sources with green dot + name + records count
    - **Alerts & Issues** card: List of non-connected APIs with yellow warning styling or success message

**Data Management:**
- Uses `useSourcesStore()` hook with full CRUD methods: `createDataSource`, `updateDataSource`, `deleteDataSource`, etc.
- Dialog system with mode states (create/edit/view): 
  - `DataSourceDialog` (56 lines) – **STUB:** only displays `metricName`, no form fields
  - `ApiConnectionDialog` (55 lines) – **STUB:** only displays `name`, no form fields
  - `GovernancePolicyDialog` (56 lines) – **STUB:** minimal
  - `ExportDialog` (37 lines) – **STUB:** hardcoded format selection
  - `MonitoringSettingsDialog` (41 lines) – **STUB:** minimal
- Handlers: `handleDelete()` (lines 154–181), `handleExport()`, `handleRefresh()`, with confirmation dialogs

**Table Patterns:**
- Raw HTML tables with `thead`, `tbody`, `<th>`, `<td>` (not TanStack Table or shadcn/ui table component)
- Header styling: `bg-muted/50`, `text-xs`, `uppercase tracking-wider`
- Status icons via helper functions (lines 231–255): `getStatusIcon()`, `getApiStatusIcon()`, `getDataQualityColor()`
- Inline badges for statuses and categories
- Icon + code snippet for event names (line 552–554)

**Dated UI Issues:**
- **Empty dialog stubs:** All CRUD dialogs are minimal placeholders with no form controls, validation, or field binding (compare to SourceConfigSheet which is comprehensive)
- **Raw HTML tables:** No use of shadcn/ui table or TanStack React Table (modern pattern); CSS Grid-based layouts used elsewhere but not here
- **Mixed styles:** Some views use cards (Governance), others use tables (Data Sources, API Health); inconsistent interaction patterns
- **No pagination/virtualization:** Tables could have unbounded rows
- **No inline editing:** Actions require dropdown > modal dialog flow
- **Search/filter scattered:** Each tab reimplements search/filter UI independently; `useSourceFiltering` hook exists but filtering logic is duplicated
- **Basic status indicators:** Simple colored icons/badges; no sparklines or trend visualizations
- **No multi-select actions:** Bulk operations not supported
- **Hard to distinguish:** Columns in tables not sticky; no resizable columns
- **Empty states generic:** Same icon for all empty tabs (Database, Shield, Link icons) but messaging is tab-specific
- **No data loading states:** No skeleton loaders while fetching sources

---

## 3. CONSOLIDATION OPPORTUNITIES

**Overlap between Dashboard & Source pages:**

1. **Redundant stat cards:**
   - Dashboard shows: Total Metrics, Relationships, Health Score, Last Updated
   - Source page shows: Active Sources, Data Quality %, API Health, Compliance %
   - Both pages calculate overlapping metrics independently; no shared stat component

2. **Scattered data-source UX:**
   - **Canvas (source-node):** SourceConfigSheet.tsx (438 lines) provides full data configuration (warehouse, file, manual, generate) with preview & run/save flow
   - **Sources page:** Minimal dialogs (56–37 lines each) for managing the same entities
   - **Data contract split:** `sourceBinding.ts` defines `MetricValue` and `deriveSeries()` in canvas utils; Sources page doesn't surface series preview or validation
   - No bidirectional sync between canvas source nodes and Source page data sources

3. **Dashboard generator vs. Source page tabs:**
   - Dashboard uses `generateDashboardsFromGroups()` which filters canvas nodes by group membership
   - Source page independently fetches/manages data sources, governance, APIs via Zustand store
   - No connection: a metric card's data source isn't linked to a "Data Source" record in Source page

4. **Multiple ways to define metrics:**
   - **Canvas:** Metric nodes with inline data (manual rows, generated series, file, warehouse)
   - **Sources page:** DataSource records (metricName, sourceSystem, eventName, status, etc.)
   - **Unclear mapping:** Are Sources page records meant to be "connectors" to external systems that feed canvas metrics? Currently no clear schema.

**Inefficiencies:**

- Redundant filtering/search logic (dashboard category filter vs. source system/status filters)
- Two separate stat card designs (dashboard uses 4-column grid, source uses same but computes different metrics)
- Dialog CRUD patterns not reused across features (Source page dialogs are stubs; canvas uses different patterns)

---

## 4. TOP MODERNIZATION OPPORTUNITIES (Prioritized)

### **High Priority — Core UX Gaps**

#### 1. **Complete Source Page Dialog System** ⭐ (Concrete, High Impact)
- **Issue:** All 5 CRUD dialogs (DataSourceDialog, ApiConnectionDialog, GovernancePolicyDialog, ExportDialog, MonitoringSettingsDialog) are 37–56 line stubs with no form controls
- **Opportunity:** Build full forms with:
  - Field binding (React Hook Form or Zod-based forms)
  - Validation (zod schemas exist in `source.ts`)
  - Rich inputs (selects, checkboxes, multi-select for tags/compliance)
  - Async handlers (create, update, delete with feedback)
  - Error handling and success toasts
- **File:** `/home/nadeemramli/workspace/github.com/nadeemramli/metric-mapping/src/features/sources/components/dialogs/`
- **Estimate:** 3–4 days (one day per dialog type, reuse form patterns)

#### 2. **Replace HTML Tables with Modern Data Table** ⭐ (Concrete, High Impact)
- **Issue:** Source page Data Sources (lines 491–637) and API Health (lines 749–871) tabs use raw HTML tables; no sorting, resizing, or column hiding
- **Opportunity:** 
  - Implement TanStack React Table v8 (already in package.json) for:
    - Column management (hide/show)
    - Sorting (multi-column)
    - Row selection + bulk actions
    - Pagination/virtualization for large datasets
    - Resizable columns
  - Or use shadcn/ui's table component with enhanced features
  - Reuse for both tabs (DRY principle)
- **Files:** 
  - `/home/nadeemramli/workspace/github.com/nadeemramli/metric-mapping/src/features/sources/pages/SourcePage.tsx` (lines 491–637, 749–871)
- **Estimate:** 2–3 days

#### 3. **Replace DIV-based Trends with Real Charts** ⭐ (Concrete, High Impact)
- **Issue:** Dashboard KPI cards (lines 485–496) render trends as colored `<div>` bars; no actual chart library
- **Opportunity:**
  - Add sparkline charts (Recharts mini line/bar) for each KPI showing trend over selected time period
  - Use Recharts' `ResponsiveContainer` + `LineChart` with `XAxis`, `YAxis`, `Tooltip`
  - Example: 6-point trend for "Last 7 days" as a small inline chart
- **File:** `/home/nadeemramli/workspace/github.com/nadeemramli/metric-mapping/src/features/dashboard/pages/DashboardPage.tsx` (lines 485–496)
- **Estimate:** 1–2 days

#### 4. **Implement Unified Filter/Search Component** 🔧 (Code Quality)
- **Issue:** Dashboard category filter (lines 421–436) and Source page status/system filters (lines 432–464) are independent; `useSourceFiltering` hook (referenced line 134) suggests intended shared pattern

### **Medium Priority — Visual Consistency & Modern Patterns**

  - Support 2/3/4-column layouts via props
  - Add "customize dashboard" panel to save preferred layout

lastPrompt: Can you help me check other pages of the apps: we have homepage, then canvas, then we have other pages within a canvas (dashboard, evidence, etc) - we are using old design, I want to modernize them an…

aiTitle: Modernize app pages and consolidate UI/UX

content.text:
I've completed a deep analysis across all four page groups via parallel exploration. Before I write the final modernization plan, let me synthesize what I found and clarify a few scope decisions — because the findings are extensive and the right sequencing depends on your intent.

## What I found — the big picture

The app is built on a **modern foundation** (React 19, Tailwind v4 with OKLCH tokens, shadcn/ui, Recharts available), but the *pages* haven't kept up with it. The same handful of "dated" patterns repeat across every page:

**Cross-cutting issues (appear on almost every page):**
- **Native browser `confirm()`/`alert()`** for deletes/errors — non-accessible, blocks the thread (Evidence, Assets, Sources)
- **Hand-rolled modals** (`fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 …`) instead of shadcn `Dialog`/`Sheet` (Assets ×3, Settings ×1)
- **Hardcoded colors** (`bg-green-50`, `text-blue-600`) bypassing the OKLCH token system → breaks dark mode (ProjectCard, ProjectTable, AutoSaveIndicator, Assets checkboxes)
- **Raw HTML inputs/tables** instead of shadcn `Input`/`Table` + TanStack Table (Sources, Assets, Settings GeneralTab, Evidence detail)
- **No loading skeletons / inconsistent empty states / locale-dependent dates**

**Page-specific structural problems:**
- **Canvas** — UI is scattered across 4 position-based floating panels (top-center toolbar, top-left operators, top-right groups, bottom selection) + 3 independent right-slide sheets. Poor discoverability, no command palette, mode toggle lives in the header away from the canvas. Also `EnhancedCanvasPage` is a half-finished experiment.
- **Assets** — **1791 lines** of bloat: it re-implements tables inline while `MetricsTable.tsx`/`RelationshipsTable.tsx` sit unused, and embeds 3 hand-rolled dialogs. Could drop to ~600 lines.
- **Sources** — all 5 CRUD dialogs are empty stubs; raw HTML tables; the rich data-source config (`source-config-sheet.tsx`) on the canvas is **disconnected** from this page.
- **Dashboard** — "charts" are colored `<div>` bars (Recharts unused); insights are hardcoded mocks.
- **Evidence** — repository serves two contexts (global vs in-canvas) with implicit, unclear adaptation; detail page uses raw HTML inputs.

**The consolidation theme:** data-source UX is fragmented across Canvas source nodes, the Sources page, and Dashboard — three places defining/showing metrics with no shared model or lineage.

Now, to shape the plan around your actual goals:

questions.question: How do you want to sequence this modernization effort?

options.label: Foundation first (Recommended)
options.description: Build shared primitives once — ConfirmDialog, EmptyState, DataTable (TanStack), FilterBar, token cleanup — then refactor each page to use them. Slower start, but every page improves consistently and later pages go fast.

options.label: Page-by-page, end-to-end
options.description: Pick the worst pages and fully modernize each before moving on. Faster visible wins per page, but risks re-inventing shared patterns and inconsistency.

options.label: Just the assessment doc
options.description: You want the written analysis + prioritized roadmap only, no implementation now. I'll deliver a thorough plan you can execute later.

questions.question: Which areas matter most to you right now? (pick all that apply)

options.label: Canvas UX consolidation
options.description: Unify the scattered floating panels into a coherent inspector + floating toolbar + command palette. Highest-effort, highest-impact.

options.label: Data/Sources/Dashboard
options.description: Real charts, working Source CRUD, connect canvas source-nodes ↔ Sources page ↔ Dashboard with a shared data model & lineage.

options.label: Assets & Evidence cleanup
options.description: De-bloat AssetsPage (1791→~600 lines), modern data tables, fix dual-context Evidence, shared selection/bulk patterns.

options.label: Global visual polish
options.description: Token cleanup (kill hardcoded colors), kill native confirm/alert, loading skeletons, consistent empty states & dates across all pages.

questions.question: Any target aesthetic or reference app for the 'modern' direction?

options.label: Linear / Notion style
options.description: Clean, dense, neutral palette, subtle borders, keyboard-first (command palette). Fits a power-user metric tool.

options.label: Figma / Excalidraw style
options.description: Canvas-tool aesthetic: floating pill toolbars, contextual panels, playful but precise. Strong fit for the canvas itself.

options.label: Keep current look, modernize structure
options.description: Don't change the visual identity much — focus on consolidation, components, and fixing the dated mechanics.

options.label: You decide / propose options
options.description: I'll recommend a direction in the plan and show a couple of concrete mockups for the canvas + a page.

aiTitle: Modernize app pages and consolidate UI/UX

content.text: Everything needed is already installed: `@tanstack/react-table`, `cmdk`, `date-fns`, `recharts`. This is purely an **adoption + consolidation** effort — no new dependencies. Now I'll write the plan.

input.content:
# Metrimap UI/UX Modernization Plan

## Context

Metrimap sits on a **modern foundation** (React 19, Tailwind v4 with OKLCH design tokens, shadcn/ui, TanStack Query/Table, cmdk, Recharts, date-fns — all already installed) but the **pages were built before that foundation matured**. The same dated patterns repeat on nearly every page: native `confirm()`/`alert()`, hand-rolled `fixed inset-0 bg-black/50` modals, hardcoded colors that break dark mode, raw HTML inputs/tables, no loading states, and inconsistent empty states. Structurally, the canvas UI is fragmented across four floating panels, `AssetsPage` is 1791 lines of inline bloat (with unused table components sitting next to it), and the data-source story is split across three disconnected surfaces (canvas source-nodes, Sources page, Dashboard).

**Goal:** Modernize all pages to a clean, dense, keyboard-first **Linear/Notion aesthetic** using the existing token system and shadcn primitives. Approach is **foundation-first**: build/adopt a small set of shared primitives once, then refactor each page onto them so consistency comes for free.

**Decisions locked with owner:** foundation-first sequencing · all four areas in scope (canvas UX, data/sources/dashboard, assets/evidence, global polish) · Linear/Notion visual direction · no new dependencies (everything needed is installed).

---

## Key insight: almost everything already exists

`src/shared/components/ui/` already contains: `alert-dialog`, `command`, `dialog`, `sheet`, `drawer`, `skeleton`, `sonner`, `chart` (shadcn Recharts wrapper), `table`, `pagination`, `sidebar`, `breadcrumb`, `scroll-area`, `resizable`, `popover`, `tooltip`, `progress`, `checkbox`, `KeyboardShortcutsHelp`. The work is mostly **wiring these in** and removing the hand-rolled equivalents. Only ~4 thin shared wrappers are genuinely missing.

---

## Phase 0 — Foundation (build once, reuse everywhere)

Create a small set of shared primitives under `src/shared/components/` + `src/shared/hooks/` + `src/shared/utils/`. These are the leverage points every later phase depends on.

1. **`ConfirmDialog` + `useConfirmDialog`** — promise-based confirm wrapping existing `ui/alert-dialog.tsx`. Replaces all native `confirm()`. Signature: `await confirm({ title, description, actionLabel, destructive })`.
2. **`EmptyState`** — consolidate the two existing variants (`src/features/projects/components/EmptyState.tsx`, `src/features/assets/components/emptystate/AssetsEmptyState.tsx`) into one `shared/components/EmptyState.tsx` with `{ icon, title, description, action }`. Context-aware (distinguish "no data" vs "no results for filter").
3. **`DataTable`** — generic wrapper over `@tanstack/react-table` + `ui/table.tsx` + `ui/pagination.tsx`. Built-in: column sorting/visibility, row selection, pagination, sticky header, `SelectionToolbar` slot for bulk actions. This single component replaces every raw `<table>` (Assets ×2, Sources ×2).
4. **`FilterBar`** — extract the well-structured filter pattern from `EvidenceRepositoryPage.tsx:257-305` (search input + configurable `Select` dropdowns) into `shared/components/FilterBar.tsx`. Reused by Assets, Sources, Evidence, Dashboard.
5. **`formatDate` util** — `shared/utils/formatDate.ts` using `date-fns` (`format(d, 'MMM d, yyyy')`). Replaces all `toLocaleDateString()`.
6. **`statusHelpers` util** — `shared/utils/statusHelpers.ts` centralizing the duplicated `getStatusIcon`/`getDataQualityColor` logic (currently in `SourcePage.tsx:231-255`) as token-based maps.
7. **Token cleanup pass** — replace hardcoded `bg-*-50`/`text-*-600` with semantic tokens. Add missing **status tokens** (`--status-success/warning/error/info`) to `src/styles/index.css` (already OKLCH) and a `StatusBadge` component. Worst offenders: `AutoSaveIndicator.tsx` (~8), `ProjectCard.tsx`, `ProjectTable.tsx`, `ProjectControls.tsx` (black "New Canvas" button → `bg-primary`), Assets checkboxes (`text-blue-600`).

**Exit criteria for Phase 0:** primitives exist with Storybook stories; no behavior change yet on pages.

---

## Phase 1 — Global polish (apply foundation across all pages)

Mechanical sweep applying Phase 0 primitives. High consistency payoff, low risk.

- Replace **every** `confirm()`/`alert()` with `useConfirmDialog` + `sonner` toasts. Sites: `EvidenceRepositoryPage`, `AssetsPage` (8+ alerts, 6 confirms), `SourcePage`.
- Replace hand-rolled `fixed inset-0 bg-black/50` modals with `ui/dialog.tsx` or `ui/sheet.tsx`. Sites: `AssetsPage.tsx:1544-1788` (×3), `CanvasSettingsPage.tsx:320-422` (×1).
- Replace raw HTML `<input>`/`<textarea>` with `ui/input.tsx`/`ui/textarea.tsx`. Sites: `GeneralTab.tsx:70-85`, `EvidencePage.tsx:186-218`.
- Add `ui/skeleton.tsx` loading states to data-fetching pages (Dashboard, Sources, Assets, Evidence).
- Swap all dates to `formatDate`; all empty states to shared `EmptyState`.

---

## Phase 2 — Page structural refactors

### 2a. AssetsPage (1791 → ~600 lines) — highest cleanup ROI
- **Use the unused components**: import existing `MetricsTable.tsx` / `RelationshipsTable.tsx` (or fold them into the new `DataTable`) instead of the inline tables at `AssetsPage.tsx:1142-1502`.
- Extract the 3 inline dialogs (`TagDialog`, `TagManagementDialog`, `AddAssetDialog`) into `src/features/assets/components/`.
- Extract column config → `assets/config/tableColumns.ts`; selection logic → `useTableSelection` hook.

### 2b. Evidence
- Make the dual-context (`/evidence` global vs `/canvas/:id/evidence`) **explicit**: add `ui/breadcrumb.tsx` showing scope, and context-aware empty-state copy. Reference: `EvidenceRepositoryPage.tsx:85-120` (merge logic), `:359-366` ("View in Canvas").
- Detail page (`EvidencePage.tsx`): shadcn form inputs + autosave indicator (reuse `AutoSaveIndicator` pattern).

### 2c. Settings
- `GeneralTab` → shadcn form components; tag-management dialog → `ui/dialog.tsx`.

---

## Phase 3 — Data/Sources/Dashboard consolidation (the biggest UX win)

The core fragmentation: a metric's data is defined in **three disconnected places**. Unify them.

- **Sources page**: fill in the 5 stub CRUD dialogs (`src/features/sources/components/dialogs/`) with real forms (Zod schemas exist in `sources/source.ts`); replace raw HTML tables with the new `DataTable`.
- **Dashboard**: replace `<div>`-bar fake charts (`DashboardPage.tsx:485-496`) with real sparklines via `ui/chart.tsx` (shadcn Recharts wrapper). Wire real insights (currently `TODO` mock at `:147`).
- **Connect the model**: add `sourceId` reference on metric cards so the canvas `source-config-sheet.tsx` (438 lines, comprehensive) selects from Sources-page records; surface "Used By" lineage on the Sources page and Dashboard. This is the consolidation the owner asked for — single data model, no duplicate definitions.

> Note: depends on the in-progress data-source work (`sourceBinding.ts`, `source-config-sheet.tsx`, `source_connections` migration). Coordinate so this phase extends rather than collides with it.

---

## Phase 4 — Canvas UX consolidation (highest effort, do last)

Replace the four scattered floating panels with a coherent, Linear-style layout.

- **Right-side Inspector** (`RightSidebar.tsx`): one dockable panel (collapsible) that absorbs `CardSettingsSheet`, `RelationshipSheet`, `ControlPanel` (operators), and `GroupsPanel` as context-switched tabs — replacing 3 independent right-slide sheets + 2 toggled left/right panels. Use `ui/resizable.tsx` + `ui/sidebar.tsx`.
- **Command palette** (Cmd/Ctrl+K): build on installed `cmdk` + existing `ui/command.tsx` (and the placeholder `QuickSearchCommand.tsx` being rebuilt). Searchable actions: add nodes, layout, run pipeline, filters, navigate.
- **Floating pill toolbar** (Figma/Excalidraw-style for the canvas surface specifically): consolidate `TopCanvasToolbar` + whiteboard tools + on-canvas **mode indicator** (move mode toggle out of the header).
- **Selection → context menu**: move `SelectionPanel` (bottom-center) actions into a right-click `ui/`-based context menu near the selection + the inspector.
- **Keyboard shortcuts**: surface via existing `ui/KeyboardShortcutsHelp.tsx`.
- **Dead code**: decide on `EnhancedCanvasPage.tsx` (310-line half-finished experiment at `/canvas/:id/enhanced`) — fold useful bits into the new toolbar or delete.

---

## Files at the center of the work

- Foundation: `src/shared/components/{ConfirmDialog,EmptyState,DataTable,FilterBar,StatusBadge}.tsx`, `src/shared/hooks/{useConfirmDialog,useTableSelection}.ts`, `src/shared/utils/{formatDate,statusHelpers}.ts`, `src/styles/index.css` (status tokens)
- Polish/refactor targets: `src/features/assets/pages/AssetsPage.tsx`, `src/features/sources/pages/SourcePage.tsx`, `src/features/dashboard/pages/DashboardPage.tsx`, `src/features/evidence/pages/{EvidenceRepositoryPage,EvidencePage}.tsx`, `src/features/canvas/pages/CanvasSettingsPage.tsx`, `src/features/canvas/components/settings/tabs/GeneralTab.tsx`, `src/features/canvas/components/header/AutoSaveIndicator.tsx`, `src/features/projects/components/{ProjectCard,ProjectTable,ProjectControls}.tsx`
- Canvas: `src/features/canvas/pages/CanvasPage.tsx`, `src/features/canvas/components/mini-control/TopCanvasToolbar.tsx`, `.../left-sidepanel/{ControlPanel,GroupsPanel}.tsx`, `.../panels/{metric-panel/CardSettingsSheet,relationship-panel/RelationshipSheet,NodeSettingsRouter}.tsx`, `.../grouping/SelectionPanel.tsx`, `.../search/QuickSearchCommand.tsx`

## Reuse (do NOT rebuild)
`ui/alert-dialog`, `ui/command` + `cmdk`, `ui/dialog`, `ui/sheet`, `ui/skeleton`, `ui/sonner`, `ui/chart`, `ui/table` + `@tanstack/react-table`, `ui/pagination`, `ui/sidebar`, `ui/breadcrumb`, `ui/resizable`, `ui/KeyboardShortcutsHelp`, `date-fns`, existing `MetricsTable.tsx`/`RelationshipsTable.tsx`, Zod schemas in `sources/source.ts`.

---

## Verification

- `npm run type-check` && `npm run lint` after each phase (note: `CanvasPage.tsx` carries `@ts-nocheck` debt — don't expand it).
- `npm run storybook` — Phase 0 primitives get stories; visually verify light + **dark mode** (the token cleanup is specifically to fix dark mode).
- `npm run dev` (port 3000) — manual walkthrough per page: trigger a delete (confirm dialog + toast), open each refactored dialog/sheet, load a data table (sort/select/paginate), toggle dark mode on every page.
- `npm run test` for any logic changes (data-model `sourceId` linkage in Phase 3); per memory, plain `*.test.ts` need the standalone vitest config to actually run.
- Canvas (Phase 4): verify Cmd+K palette, inspector context-switching across node/edge/operator/group selection, mode toggle on canvas surface.

## Suggested execution order
Phase 0 → 1 (foundation + sweep, unblocks everything) → 2 (Assets/Evidence/Settings cleanup) → 3 (data consolidation) → 4 (canvas). Each phase is independently shippable.

Replace the four scattered floating panels with a coherent, Linear-style layout.

Use `ui/resizable.tsx` + `ui/sidebar.tsx`.
- **Command palette** (Cmd/Ctrl+K): build on installed `cmdk` + existing `ui/command.tsx` (and the placeholder `QuickSearchCommand.tsx` being rebuilt). Searchable actions: add nodes, layout, run pipeline, filters, navigate.
- **Floating pill toolbar** (Figma/Excalidraw-style for the canvas surface specifically): consolidate `TopCanvasToolbar` + whiteboard tools + on-canvas **mode indicator** (move mode toggle out of the header).

- Foundation: `src/shared/components/{ConfirmDialog,EmptyState,DataTable,FilterBar,StatusBadge}.tsx`, `src/shared/hooks/{useConfirmDialog,useTableSelection}.ts`, `src/shared/utils/{formatDate,statusHelpers}.ts`, `src/styles/index.css` (status tokens)
- Polish/refactor targets: `src/features/assets/pages/AssetsPage.tsx`, `src/features/sources/pages/SourcePage.tsx`, `src/features/dashboard/pages/DashboardPage.tsx`, `src/features/evidence/pages/{EvidenceRepositoryPage,EvidencePage}.tsx`, `src/features/canvas/pages/CanvasSettingsPage.tsx`, `src/features/canvas/components/settings/tabs/GeneralTab.tsx`, `src/features/canvas/components/header/AutoSaveIndicator.tsx`, `src/features/projects/components/{ProjectCard,ProjectTable,ProjectControls}.tsx`
- Canvas: `src/features/canvas/pages/CanvasPage.tsx`, `src/features/canvas/components/mini-control/TopCanvasToolbar.tsx`, `.../left-sidepanel/{ControlPanel,GroupsPanel}.tsx`, `.../panels/{metric-panel/CardSettingsSheet,relationship-panel/RelationshipSheet,NodeSettingsRouter}.tsx`, `.../grouping/SelectionPanel.tsx`, `.../search/QuickSearchCommand.tsx`

`ui/alert-dialog`, `ui/command` + `cmdk`, `ui/dialog`, `ui/sheet`, `ui/skeleton`, `ui/sonner`, `ui/chart`, `ui/table` + `@tanstack/react-table`, `ui/pagination`, `ui/sidebar`, `ui/breadcrumb`, `ui/resizable`, `ui/KeyboardShortcutsHelp`, `date-fns`, existing `MetricsTable.tsx`/`RelationshipsTable.tsx`, Zod schemas in `sources/source.ts`.
